sizing_rule.note: Parametric optimal f using Equation 3.28 with standard normal deviates mapped to P&L distribution (mean=330.13, stdev=1743.23). Stretch=1, shrink=1. Specific optimal_f value not stated; requires calculation from parametric distribution across range ~-2.8 to -1.8 sigma.

source_rule_text: Calculate parametric optimal f position sizing by converting standard normal deviates to P&L outcomes using Equation 3.28, then apply stretch and shrink parameters (both set to 1) to determine position size across the probability distribution.
